title: General Consultation
description: Connect with experienced general practitioners for comprehensive health assessments, diagnosis, and treatment plans from the comfort of your home.

title: Find Doctors
description: Browse our network of verified, qualified healthcare professionals across Sierra Leone. Filter by specialty, location, hospital, and availability.

title: Appointment Booking
description: Book appointments seamlessly with your preferred doctor or specialist. Receive instant confirmation and reminders via SMS and email.

title: Medicine Information
description: Access Sierra Leone's most comprehensive medicine database. Find dosage information, side effects, alternatives, and local availability.

title: Lab & Diagnostics
description: Book diagnostic tests and laboratory services at partner facilities. Get results online and share them directly with your doctor.

title: Emergency Services
description: 24/7 emergency assistance and guidance. Get connected to the nearest emergency facility and receive guidance while help is on the way.
